channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump’s billionaire pick to lead NASA sparks debate over the future of space exploration
item.description: Jared Isaacman, billionaire, CEO and nominee to become the next NASA administrator, faced questions on April 9, 2025, from members of the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation during his confirmation hearing for the position.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: iPhones made in the USA? Here’s why that won’t happen, even with Trump’s tariffs on China
item.description: President Donald Trump’s administration has been predicting its barrage of tariffs targeting China will push Apple into manufacturing the iPhone in the United States for the first time. But that’s an unlikely scenario even with U.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Vendors vote to radically slash website certificate duration
item.description: In a move that will likely force IT to much more aggressively use web certificate automation services, the Certification Authority Browser Forum (CA/Browser Forum), a gathering of certificate issuers and suppliers of applications that use certificates, voted Friday to radically slash the lifespan of
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Social Security Administration 'will be using X to communicate' moving forward
item.description: The shift comes as communications staff at the agency has dwindled due to reassignments in front-facing roles at field offices across the country.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Irish privacy watchdog investigates Elon Musk's X's use of personal data to train Grok AI chatbot
item.description: Ireland’s data privacy watchdog says it’s investigating Elon Musk’s social media platform X over its use of personal data to train his artificial intelligence chatbot Grok.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Doctors remove pig kidney from an Alabama woman after a record 130 days
item.description: An Alabama woman who lived with a pig kidney for a record 130 days had the organ removed and is back on dialysis.
item.dc:creator: Lauran Neergaard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WhatsApp has just dropped these 9 new features – including 2 that I'm not happy about
item.description: WhatsApp has just rolled out an endless list of new call and chat functions, but two of them have really rubbed users the wrong way.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Sununu knocks Musk over 'bad messaging' about DOGE cuts
item.description: Former New Hampshire Gov. Chris Sununu (R) knocked Elon Musk for “bad messaging” about cuts ordered by the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). “I think the key here is bad messaging, right? I think people appreciate waste, fraud and abuse.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft’s latest attempt to persuade upgrades to Windows 11 falls spectacularly flat on its face
item.description: “You’ve heard the buzz about Windows 11, but is it worth the upgrade?” Microsoft asks. And going by this new article, it isn’t really.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Russian hackers hit military mission in Ukraine with info-stealing malware on external drives
item.description: GammaSteel infostealer found on infected devices belonging to a Western military operation in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CIO Sharon Mandell transforms Juniper Networks for the AI era
item.description: CIOs have elevated their stature in the business by driving digital transformations for nearly a decade. Now, top-level IT chiefs are taking this formula a step further by putting digital initiatives to work in helping transform the business itself.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: More and faster: New proposals changing Python from within
item.description: Top picks for Python readers on InfoWorld Making Python faster won’t be easy, but it’ll be worth it Python’s malleability and dynamism make it powerful, but also very hard to speed up. Here’s a look at some of the ways developers are working to make Python faster from within.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Morocco’s social security database hacked and leaked on Telegram
item.description: Morocco‘s social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Here's an Apple Studio Display alternative for the rest of us - the oddly-named Dough Spectrum Canvas offers 6K resolution
item.description: Dough Spectrum Canvas delivers a 6K experience for Mac users, offering a high-quality alternative to Apple's expensive Studio Display.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: These tech leaders donated to Donald Trump. Now they’re out billions of dollars
item.description: While Elon Musk may be in the spotlight due to his proximity to Trump, he’s not the xonly prominent tech figure to experience recent losses.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Hackers breach Morocco's social security database in an unprecedented cyberattack
item.description: RABAT, Morocco (AP) — Morocco 's social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: SAM METZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI fears irreparable harm from Musk, files countersuit
item.description: OpenAI has filed a countersuit against Elon Musk, accusing the billionaire of a sustained campaign to damage the company and urging a US federal court to block further actions it described as unlawful and disruptive.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How Trump's trade war with China will hit tech prices
item.description: President Trump’s escalating trade war with China is putting a spotlight on the various technology companies and products poised to feel the ripple effects of the ongoing conflict.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Siete reglas de gestión de riesgos que todo CIO debe seguir
item.description: El riesgo es inevitable. Sólo hay que mirar alrededor para ver los obstáculos tecnológicos, económicos y competitivos que los directores de sistemas de información no solo deben gestionar, sino vencer.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GitHub Advanced Security now offers security campaigns
item.description: GitHub has made security campaigns available for GitHub Advanced Security and GitHub Code Security users. Security campaigns help control security debt and manage risk by enabling collaboration between developers and security teams, GitHub said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OPM digitizes federal retirement booklets as part of longtime modernization effort
item.description: OPM said the digital versions of four federal retirement booklets are immediately available for download and should reduce delays for federal retirees. The post OPM digitizes federal retirement booklets as part of longtime modernization effort first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Agentic AI – Ongoing coverage of its impact on the enterprise
item.description: Over the next few years, agentic AI is expected to bring not only rapid technological breakthroughs, but a societal transformation, redefining how we live, work and interact with the world. And this shift is happening quickly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google Cloud introduces cloud app design center
item.description: Google Cloud has introduced Application Design Center, a service that helps platform administrators and developers design, deploy, and manage applications on the Google Cloud Platform. Application Design Center is in public preview.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft fires employees who protested its support for Israel
item.description: Two Microsoft employees were fired for protests condemning the company’s support for Israel at a 50th anniversary event last week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: What is Kubernetes? Scalable cloud-native applications
item.description: Kubernetes is a popular open source platform for container orchestration—that is, for managing applications built from multiple, largely self-contained runtimes called containers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft workers say they've been fired after 50th anniversary protest over Israel contract
item.description: Microsoft has fired two employees who interrupted the company's 50th anniversary celebration to protest its work supplying artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military, according to a group representing the workers.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Five tips for incoming CIOs under the new administration
item.description: Max Everett, a former Energy Department CIO, offers some advice for how new agency technology leaders can deal with some basic challenges. The post Five tips for incoming CIOs under the new administration first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network
